metadata.title: OmniPic — AI Photo and Video Enhancement
metadata.description: The ultimate AI-powered photo and video enhancement platform. Restore old photos, improve quality, and bring your memories to life.

hero.headline: The only photo and video enhancement platform you'll ever need
hero.subtitle: Transformative AI technology that upgrades your low-quality photos to HD. Restore old photos, bring memories to life, and elevate your content to a professional level.

memoriasVivas.title: Living Memories — You, like you've never seen before
memoriasVivas.description: Try hyper-realistic AI photos of yourself. With just one selfie, create professional photoshoots in any setting, style, or era.
memoriasVivas.pageSubtitle: Upload a few selfies and let our AI create hundreds of professional photos of you in different styles, settings and outfits — all with studio quality.
memoriasVivas.examplesSubtitle: Every photo below was AI-generated from a few selfies. Zero makeup, zero studio, zero limits.

steps.title: Upload 10-20 selfies
steps.description: Clear photos of your face from different angles and lighting.

steps.title: AI learns your face
steps.description: Our model learns your unique features in minutes, with full privacy.

steps.title: Get hundreds of photos
steps.description: Pick styles and scenes and receive 4K-ready photoshoots to download.

features.title: Results in minutes
features.description: While others take hours, we deliver complete photoshoots in under 2 minutes per style.

features.title: Privacy guaranteed
features.description: Your photos and model are never shared. Auto-deleted within 24h.

features.title: 4K hyper-realism
features.description: Professional studio quality — indistinguishable from a real photo.

features.title: Unlimited*
features.description: Generate as many styles as you want with your Living Memories plan.

testimonials.name: Maria Silva
testimonials.text: I made a corporate shoot in 2 minutes. It's already my official LinkedIn photo.

testimonials.name: João Santos
testimonials.text: I saved $600 I would have spent on a photographer. The results are indistinguishable from real photos.

memoriasVivas.disclaimer: Living Memories is an AI image-generation service that creates hyper-realistic photoshoots from your own photos. Generated images are artistic and should be used responsibly. No photo is ever shared publicly.

faq.question: How many selfies do I need to upload?
faq.answer: We recommend 10-20 good-quality selfies from different angles and lighting for the best results.

faq.question: How long does it take to generate the photoshoot?
faq.answer: After upload, training takes about 15 minutes. Every style generated afterwards is ready in under 2 minutes.

faq.question: Are my photos stored?
faq.answer: No. Your original photos and trained model are automatically deleted within 24 hours. Full privacy.

faq.question: Can I choose the style?
faq.answer: Yes! We offer over 100 ready-made styles: corporate, fashion, vintage, cinematic, fantasy and much more.

faq.q1: How long does it take to enhance a photo?
faq.a1: Most photos are processed in less than 30 seconds. High-resolution photos can take up to 1 minute.
faq.a2: Yes. We use end-to-end encryption and delete all images from our servers after processing.
faq.a3: You can upload photos up to 8K and receive results up to 4K on all paid plans.
faq.q4: Can I use the result commercially?
faq.a4: With the Annual plan you get full commercial-use rights for the generated images.

legal.dataControllerText: OmniPic Tecnologia Ltda., registered under CNPJ No. 00.000.000/0001-00, headquartered in São Paulo, SP, Brazil, is the controller of your personal data.
legal.dpoText: Our Data Protection Officer can be contacted at: dpo@omnipic.net
legal.dataCollectionText:
We collect the following personal data as required by the General Data Protection Law (Law No. 13,709/2018 — LGPD):

• Identification data: full name, email address
• Usage data: images and videos uploaded for processing
• Technical data: IP address, browser type, device
• Payment data: processed by third parties (we do not store card data)
legal.legalBasisText:
We process your personal data based on the following legal bases under the LGPD:

• Consent (Art. 7, I): for image processing and marketing communications
• Performance of a contract (Art. 7, V): for providing our services
• Legitimate interest (Art. 7, IX): for service improvement and security
• Compliance with a legal obligation (Art. 7, II): for tax and regulatory obligations
legal.dataSubjectRights: Your Rights as a Data Subject
legal.dataSubjectRightsText:
Under the LGPD, you have the following rights:

• Confirmation of the existence of data processing
• Access to your personal data
• Correction of incomplete, inaccurate, or outdated data
• Anonymization, blocking, or deletion of unnecessary data
• Data portability to another provider
• Deletion of personal data processed based on consent
• Information about data sharing
• Withdrawal of consent
legal.dataRetentionText:
• Processed photos: automatically deleted 24 hours after processing
• Saved projects: kept as long as the account is active
• Account data: kept until a deletion request is made
• After account deletion: all data is removed within 30 days
legal.dataDeletionText:
You can request the deletion of your data at any time. We offer the following options:

• Delete all processed photos
• Delete your account and all personal data
• Both

Deletion deadline: up to 30 days after the request.
legal.deletionSuccess: Request submitted successfully! You will receive a confirmation by email.

termsContent.acceptanceText: By accessing and using the OmniPic platform, you agree to these Terms of Use. If you do not agree with any part of these terms, please do not use our services.
termsContent.serviceDescriptionText: OmniPic is a photo and video enhancement platform using artificial intelligence. We offer restoration services, quality enhancement, filters, effects, and memory reconstruction.
termsContent.acceptableUseText:
You agree to:

• Use the service only for lawful purposes
• Not upload illegal, offensive content, or content that violates third-party rights
• Not attempt to access unauthorized systems or data
• Not use the service to create malicious deepfakes or misleading content
• Respect the image rights of third parties
termsContent.intellectualPropertyText:
• You retain all rights to the photos and videos you upload
• The processed results are your property
• The OmniPic technology, brand, and interface are the exclusive property of OmniPic Tecnologia Ltda.
• You may not copy, modify, or distribute our technology
termsContent.liabilityText:
• AI results are approximations and may not be perfect
• We are not responsible for how you use the results
• The Living Memories service creates artistic representations, not exact portraits
• We do not guarantee uninterrupted service availability
termsContent.terminationText: We may suspend or terminate your account if you violate these terms. You can close your account at any time through settings or by contacting support.
termsContent.applicableLawText: These terms are governed by the laws of the Federative Republic of Brazil. The courts of the Judicial District of São Paulo, SP, are hereby elected to resolve any disputes.

cookiesContent.whatAreCookiesText: Cookies are small text files stored on your device when you visit our website. They help us improve your experience and provide essential functionality.
cookiesContent.essentialText: Necessary for the website to function. They include session, authentication, and language preference cookies. They cannot be disabled.
cookiesContent.analyticsText: Help us understand how visitors use our site, allowing us to improve the experience. We use Google Analytics with IP anonymization.
cookiesContent.marketingText: Used to display relevant ads and measure the effectiveness of advertising campaigns.
cookiesContent.manageCookiesText: You can manage your cookie preferences at any time through the cookie banner or in your browser settings. Disabling some cookies may affect site functionality.

cookieBanner.message: We use cookies to improve your experience. By continuing to browse, you agree to our
